## 3. Behaviors — "What is your work style?"

> Select from the dropdown and click **Add** for each. Common ATS options shown below.
> Choose 4-5 that best align with the target role and explain why.

| Behavior | Why (for your reference — not pasted into form) |
|---|---|
| **<!-- BEHAVIOR_1 -->** | <!-- BEHAVIOR_1_REASON --> |
| **<!-- BEHAVIOR_2 -->** | <!-- BEHAVIOR_2_REASON --> |
| **<!-- BEHAVIOR_3 -->** | <!-- BEHAVIOR_3_REASON --> |
| **<!-- BEHAVIOR_4 -->** | <!-- BEHAVIOR_4_REASON --> |
| **<!-- BEHAVIOR_5 -->** | <!-- BEHAVIOR_5_REASON --> |

**Common dropdown options:** Dedicated, Detail Oriented, Enthusiastic, Functional Expert, Innovative, Leader, Loyal, Team Player, Thought Provoking

---
